author: lOrm
content:
Fixed by the same edit as #381 — these issues describe the same vulnerability (file path passed to pdftotext/pdfinfo without an option terminator, allowing flag-shaped filenames to be parsed as flags).

Fix in src/tools/file/read.rs:
  - reject_flag_prefix() refuses any path starting with '-' BEFORE subprocess spawn
  - explicit '--' option terminator inserted before the path arg in BOTH the pdfinfo call (line ~175) and the pdftotext call (line ~210)
  - 8 new tests cover both layers — see #381 forensic evidence

Verification:
  cargo test --lib            -> 1295 passed (baseline 1287 + 8 new)
  cargo clippy -- -D warnings -> exit 0
  No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore] added.

Closing as duplicate-resolution of #381.
